intro.en: Beyond my research work, I like to stay active, cook, drink great coffee, read, and create art.

en: Staying Active: I like hiking, biking, badminton, squash, and table tennis.
Coffee: I love filter coffees brewed with a fruit, light roast. My favourite cafes and coffee roasters: Google Maps.
Reading: I enjoy reading science fiction, historical fiction, My five-star list: The StoryGraph.

teaser.en: Figure studies, sketchbook experiments, and personal drawing practice. Some pieces include nudity and may be NSFW depending on your context.

service_note.en: For a dedicated external portfolio, I recommend Cargo as the primary home because it is portfolio-oriented and designer-friendly. Pixieset is the simpler fallback if the goal is a fast image-grid presentation.
